slides.content: Why Working Memory is the Next Big AI Bottleneck
Autonomous agents are failing at long-horizon tasks because they lose context over time. Vector DBs aren't enough.
Anthropic's Claude 4.0 introduces native context-caching, solving the memory degradation problem without external orchestration wrappers.
Rethink your RAG pipeline. Native context-caching will make complex vector architectures obsolete for agentic workflows.
